title: Ranrt crystal
content:
{{Top|leg}}
[[File:Ranrt_crystal.png|thumb|right]]
A '''Ranrt crystal''' was a type of crystal used by the [[Wookiee/Legends|Wookiees]] for medicinal purposes.

At one point in [[1 ABY/Legends|1 ABY]], an individual from outside the [[Kerritamba Village]] was ordered by [[Chief/Legends|Chief]] [[Kerritamba]] to gather a Ranrt crystal for an ingredient in a remedy to cure the [[Great Tree (Kashyyyk)|Great Tree]] in the [[Kkowir Forest/Legends|Kkowir Forest]]. The only known way to get one was to recover it from a [[sayormi]] witch, who were known to carry them.

{{Stub}}

==Behind the scenes==
Ranrt crystals appeared in the [[Star Wars video games|video game]] [[Star Wars Galaxies|''Star Wars Galaxies: An Empire Divided'']], a massively multiplayer online roleplaying game developed by [[Sony]] Online Entertainment and published by [[LucasArts]], prior to its closure on [[December 15]], [[2011]].

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: The Old Republic: Knights of the Eternal Throne]]''
*''[[Star Wars Galaxies: Rage of the Wookiees]]'' {{1st}}
